file_insights.changes: Added snapshot_tests module with 14 test functions
key_patterns: Helper functions for test data (test_card, rich_card, test_app, build_test_columns)
Buffer-to-string conversion utility for snapshot content extraction
Tests cover kanban views, overlays, footers in all modes, and headers
Uses ratatui TestBackend for deterministic rendering
Snapshot naming follows test function names (e.g., bop__ui__snapshot_tests__kanban_normal_view.snap)
Each snapshot captures rendered terminal output as text
Snapshots preserve terminal dimensions and visual layout

patterns_discovered: Test-driven UI validation: using ratatui TestBackend provides deterministic, headless rendering without display requirements
Snapshot-based regression testing: insta snapshots enable visual diff detection for UI changes, reducing manual review burden
Helper function isolation: separate test data builders (test_card, rich_card, test_app) decouple test setup from assertions
Terminal dimension parametrization: tests vary width/height to validate layout behavior at different sizes
Buffer-to-string abstraction: centralizes rendering-to-text conversion logic, enabling consistent snapshot format across all tests
Mode-specific footer testing: separate test per UI mode (Normal, Detail, LogTail, Filter, ActionPopup, NewCard) ensures each mode's footer behavior is captured
Empty column collapse validation: explicit test for collapsed empty columns verifies space-saving UI logic
Provider meter visualization: header test includes provider status meters (Available, Busy, RateLimited) to validate status indicators
Time stabilization pattern: dynamic time values in headers replaced with fixed placeholders for snapshot determinism

gotchas_discovered.issue: Dynamic time values break snapshot consistency
gotchas_discovered.solution: Implement stabilize_time() function to replace time-dependent output with fixed placeholder before snapshot assertion

gotchas_discovered.issue: Trailing whitespace in rendered buffers creates noise in snapshots
gotchas_discovered.solution: buffer_to_string() trims trailing spaces per row while preserving empty rows for dimensional fidelity

gotchas_discovered.issue: Terminal dimensions are critical to layout rendering
gotchas_discovered.solution: Tests parametrize terminal_width and terminal_height to match expected viewport; mismatches cause layout shifts

gotchas_discovered.issue: No filesystem access in tests requires mock data structures
gotchas_discovered.solution: test_app() builds in-memory KanbanColumn vectors without touching cards_root directory

gotchas_discovered.issue: Buffer content extraction from ratatui TestBackend requires cell iteration
gotchas_discovered.solution: buffer_to_string() iterates (x, y) coordinates within Rect area to rebuild multi-line output

approach_outcome.completion: All 14 snapshot tests implemented and snapshots generated
test_coverage: kanban_normal_view - 2 pending cards, 1 running card, 1 done card
kanban_collapsed_empty_columns - single pending card, 4 empty columns collapsed
detail_overlay - rich card with priority and elapsed time
header_with_providers - 3 provider meters (Available, Busy, RateLimited) + throughput histogram
footer_normal_mode, footer_detail_mode, footer_logtail_mode, footer_filter_mode, footer_action_popup_mode, footer_newcard_mode
footer_with_fkey_bar - F-key legend triggered at terminal_height > 30
logtail_overlay - 5 log lines with mixed severity
kanban_with_filter - 3 pending + 1 running filtered by search term

recommendations.recommendation: Add update strategy documentation: document how to regenerate snapshots when UI changes intentionally (INSTA_UPDATE=overwrite) vs. review mismatches
Implement CI snapshot review: integrate insta with CI/CD to prevent unreviewed UI changes from merging (e.g., fail on snapshot mismatch, require review approval)
Extend test coverage: add edge case tests (very long card titles, hundreds of cards, deep nesting) and error states (disconnected provider, failed card with reason text)
Create snapshot baseline documentation: generate a visual guide or markdown table mapping snapshot files to UI components/states for onboarding new developers
Add performance baseline tests: snapshot test render times for different column/card densities to detect performance regressions early
Consider parameterized test macros: use Rust test macros to reduce boilerplate in mode-specific footer tests (currently 6 similar functions)
Archive snapshot history: track snapshot changes in git to enable visual diff review and regression detection across releases
